title: DNAtranslate
text: can install development version Rpackage GitHub :

title: DNAtranslate
text: basic example shows import DNA sequence, reverse , translate proteins.

title: DNAtranslate
code: library(DNAtranslate) # import a .txt file formatted as followed  # >Sequence Name # ATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGC # ATGCATGCATGC... sequencesDF <- readSequences("data-raw/exampleSequences.txt") head(sequencesDF) #>                            name #> 1   HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype #> 2 LT2 (wild-type) HisD Genotype #>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   sequence #> 1   #> 2 

title: DNAtranslate
code: library(DNAtranslate) # take that previously created DF and flip a specified sequence reverse <- reverseSequence(exampleSequences, "HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype") head(reverse) #>                            name #> 1   HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype #> 2 LT2 (wild-type) HisD Genotype #>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   sequence #> 1   #> 2  # now the sequence with the name "HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype" is flipped

title: DNAtranslate
code: library(DNAtranslate) # add a new column to the sequence DF with the protein sequence that corresponds with the DNA sequence proteinSequence <- translateDNA(exampleSequences, offset = 0) head(proteinSequence) #>                            name #> 1   HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype #> 2 LT2 (wild-type) HisD Genotype #>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   sequence #> 1   #> 2  #>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              protein #> 1 *APVV*L*PKI*RSASPSLISMGRNT*SSRRAMRAIWWMRLPAQARYFSATGRRNPPVITLPEPTMFYRPMAILLPVPALG*RISRNG*PFRNCRKRAFPLWHQPLKHWRRQNV*PPIKMP*PCA*TPSRSKH #> 2

text: data frame 2 columns: name name sequence sequence DNA sequence string

title: Read in sequence data — readSequences
text: dataframe two columns, column one sequence name, column two sequence data , row sequence entered

text: df dataframe exactly 2 columns, typically generated readSequence function package name name sequence needs reversed
